        = (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return !decide (false = b')] + Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return !decide (true = b')]) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] + Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')]) := by rw [h₄]
      _ = (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] + Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')]) := by
        have h₆ : (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] + Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')])
            = (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] + Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')]) := by
          have h₇ : (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) := by
            have h₈ : (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) = 1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) := by
              have h₉ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                have h₁₀ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                  simp [probTrue_add_probFalse_eq_one]
                  <;> simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ]
                  <;> norm_num
                  <;> aesop
                exact h₁₀
              linarith
            have h₉ : (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) := by
              have h₁₀ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                have h₁₁ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                  simp [probTrue_add_probFalse_eq_one]
                  <;> simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ]
                  <;> norm_num
                  <;> aesop
                exact h₁₁
              linarith
            have h₁₀ : (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= false | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = (1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ)) + (1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ)) := by
              rw [h₈, h₉]
              <;> ring_nf
            have h₁₁ : (1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ)) + (1 - (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ)) = (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) := by
              have h₁₂ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                have h₁₃ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                  have h₁₄ : (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] : ℝ) + (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')] : ℝ) = 1 := by
                    simp [prob_eq_one_iff]
                    <;>
                    (try { simp_all [decide_eq_true, decide_eq_true] }) <;>
                    (try { aesop })
                  exact h₁₄
                exact h₁₃
              linarith
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      _ = (1/2 : ℝ) * (Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (false = b')] + Pr[= true | do let b' ← ob; return decide (true = b')]) := by rfl
      _ = Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] := by
        rw [h₂]
        <;> simp_all
  -- Conclude the proof.
  exact h₅

simp [probOutput_bind_eq_sum_fintype, add_comm]

have h1 : Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return !decide (b = b')] =
        Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] := by
    simp [probOutput_eq_probFailure, probFailure_bind]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [ProbM, probOutput, probFailure, Mbind]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try { intros; simp [ProbM, probOutput, probFailure, Mbind, decide_eq_true] <;> aesop }) <;>
    (try { intros; simp [ProbM, probOutput, probFailure, Mbind, decide_eq_false] <;> aesop })
  
  have h2 : Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
      Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] = 1 := by
    have h3 : Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
        Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] = 1 := by
      calc
        Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
            Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] =
          (Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
            Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')]) := by rfl
        _ = 1 := by
          have h4 : (do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')) ∈ Set.univ := by simp
          have h5 : Set.univ = {true} ∪ {false} := by
            ext x <;> simp <;>
              (try { cases x <;> simp }) <;>
              (try { by_cases h : x = true <;> simp_all })
          rw [h5] at h4
          have h6 : (Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
            Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')]) = 1 := by
            have h7 : (Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] +
              Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')]) =
              (Pr[H = true] + Pr[H = false]) := by
              rw [show (H : Bool) = (do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')) by rfl]
              <;> simp [h5]
            have h8 : (Pr[H = true] + Pr[H = false]) = 1 := by
              have h9 : (H : Bool) ∈ Set.univ := by simp
              have h10 : Set.univ = {true, false} := by
                ext x <;> simp <;>
                  (try { cases x <;> simp }) <;>
                  (try { by_cases h : x = true <;> simp_all })
              have h11 : (Pr[H = true] + Pr[H = false]) = 1 := by
                have h12 : (H : Bool) = true ∨ (H : Bool) = false := by
                  have h13 : (H : Bool) = true ∨ (H : Bool) = false := by
                    cases (H : Bool) <;> simp
                  exact h13
                cases h12 with
                | inl h12 =>
                  simp_all [h12]
                  <;> norm_num
                | inr h12 =>
                  simp_all [h12]
                  <;> norm_num
              exact h11
            linarith
          exact h6
        _ = 1 := by rfl
    exact h3
  
  have h3 : Pr[= false | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] =
        1 - Pr[= true | do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')] := by

      have h7 : (do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')) = (do let b ←$ᵗ Bool; let b' ← ob; return decide (b = b')) := rfl
